aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation for AI visibility with good NAP consistency and a well-structured website, but lacks conversational content and FAQ schemas to be cited by AI assistants.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with relevant HVAC questions and answers.
Add conversational content targeting common AI search queries about HVAC services.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and FAQ schemas makes it harder for AI to cite them.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing an FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating detailed, authoritative content on air quality, energy efficiency, and HVAC maintenance.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-optimized content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and voice search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ schemas and conversational content, which are crucial for AI to cite them in responses.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's discuss how to optimize your content and schema to capture AI-driven leads.
